project.name: ralph-runner
project.description: 将 Harness Engineering 的上下文治理、流程治理与发布治理思路引入 Ralph Runner，在现有 PRD 执行框架上补齐执行检查点、仓库源上下文、策略门禁、证据包与审批流能力。

moduleMap.label: agentMap
responsibilities: Generate lightweight Agent Map artifacts for repository navigation and knowledge freshness checks.
gaps: No explicit source-context hint matched this module; responsibility is inferred from the file name.

moduleMap.label: designContext
responsibilities: Persist story-level and shared design context artifacts.
Synthesize bounded design guidance for execution-time prompt injection.

moduleMap.label: executionCheckpoint
responsibilities: Persist resumable execution checkpoints for story handoff and recovery.

moduleMap.label: extension
responsibilities: Activate VS Code commands and orchestrate the autonomous story loop.
Bridge persisted artifacts with Copilot Chat execution.

moduleMap.label: localization
responsibilities: Provide localized labels and messages for commands, prompts, and status UI.

moduleMap.label: policyGate
responsibilities: Evaluate preflight and completion checks against artifacts, paths, and commands.

moduleMap.label: projectConstraints
responsibilities: Scan and merge repository constraints for prompt injection and policy checks.

moduleMap.label: promptContext
responsibilities: Compose bounded prompt sections in a deterministic order.

moduleMap.label: sourceContext
responsibilities: Build and recall lightweight source-context signals for a story.

moduleMap.label: storyEvidence
responsibilities: Persist auditable completion evidence, risk assessment, and approval history.

moduleMap.label: taskMemory
responsibilities: Persist per-story task memory and recall related prior work.

moduleMap.label: taskStatus
responsibilities: Normalize noisy task signal states such as completed and inprogress.

moduleMap.label: types
responsibilities: Define shared story and artifact schemas used across the extension.

moduleMap.label: workspacePaths
responsibilities: Centralize workspace artifact paths and directory scaffolding for RALPH.

ruleEntries.label: Generated project constraints
ruleEntries.summary: Machine-readable baseline for commands, allowed paths, forbidden paths, and delivery rules.

ruleEntries.label: Editable project constraints
ruleEntries.summary: Team-maintained rule layer that should override generated assumptions.

ruleEntries.label: Extension command and setting contributions
ruleEntries.summary: Command IDs, settings, and contribution metadata exposed to VS Code.

ruleEntries.label: Source context index
ruleEntries.summary: Lightweight repository map used to recall relevant modules, entry files, and hotspots.

ruleEntries.label: Design context directory
ruleEntries.summary: Shared and story-level design notes used when UI-sensitive stories need structured visual guidance.

runbook.title: Plan
runbook.summary: Start every story by reading repository rules, story metadata, source context, and the latest persisted handoff artifacts instead of relying on prior chat state.
commands: RALPH: 刷新源码上下文索引
outputs: Confirmed scope, reusable modules, allowed paths, and missing knowledge gaps.

runbook.title: Execute
runbook.summary: Apply focused changes in allowed paths and prefer existing artifact producers over bespoke scanning or one-off logic.
outputs: Relevant source changes and any refreshed support artifacts needed by the story.

runbook.title: Checkpoint
runbook.summary: Before handing off, persist structured task memory, execution checkpoint, and evidence so the next session can resume from files instead of conversation history.

runbook.title: Reset
runbook.summary: End the story by clearing implicit session assumptions, relying on persisted artifacts, and using reset only for explicit recovery or reruns.
commands: Write .ralph/task-US-xxx-status when the story is truly complete
outputs: Fresh next-session handoff with no hidden state dependency.
